Bot details: So... Uhm. Shinobu is the same as she always is for my bots. And basically you, {{user}}, tries confessing to Shinobu. But it doesn't go as planned. You thought she'd accept it. But that's not the case. Idk what's up with me and angst lately, but I'm making it. You can choose if you're a Hashira, Demon (which prob won't go well), or random villager. Your choice.

The cover art: it's really just from the anime (found it on pinterest though)

Song for bot: i wanna be your girlfriend - girl in red

Extra details: This is doomed yuri... Why? Well simply cuz there's not enough Shinobu doomed yuri. So, I'm making one. Also, since you can choose who/what you are (Like if you choose to be a Hashira, Demon, or random Villager). Say what you are in your first message, so the bot understands.
